$$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_MEASURE_SC_AGGR INV
/*LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_SUMMARY_QUOTE_SOL_ALLOC QUOTE
ON QUOTE.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = INV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND QUOTE.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0*/
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SMR_INCR SC_SNAP
ON SC_SNAP.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY=INV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
AND  SC_SNAP.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY    >0
AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD   IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE')
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_REG_SNAP_TV SC_TV
ON SC_TV.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY       =INV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
AND SC_TV.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY>0
AND Extract(YEAR From SC_TV.END_TV_DTM)='3500'
AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD NOT IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE')
WHERE INV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY > 0
AND (INV.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY<0 or INV.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT <0)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SMR_INCR SC1
WHERE SC1.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY=INV.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
AND SC1.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY    >0)
AND NOT EXISTS (
	SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_INV_REV_MSR_SC_NET_CHANGE WI
	WHERE WI.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = INV.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
	AND WI.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD=INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
	AND WI.GL_DT=INV.GL_DT
	)

AND QUOTE.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0*/
/*
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SMR_INCR SC_SNAP
ON SC_SNAP.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=INV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND  SC_SNAP.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY    >0
AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD   IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE')
*/



LEFT JOIN --STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SMR_INCR SC_SNAP
(
SEL RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,
SALES_MOTION_CD,
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
SALES_REP_NUMBER,
BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
Sum(TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT) AS TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT
FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SMR_INCR 
WHERE
RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
)SC_SNAP
ON SC_SNAP.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=INV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND  SC_SNAP.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY    >0
AND DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD   IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE')
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_REG_SNAP_TV SC_TV
ON SC_TV.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       =INV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND SC_TV.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0
AND Extract(YEAR From SC_TV.END_TV_DTM)='3500'
AND INV.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD NOT IN ('ATTRIBUTED', 'STANDALONE')
AND (INV.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY<0 or INV.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT <0)
WHERE INV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY > 0
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SMR_INCR SC1
WHERE SC1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=INV.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND  SC1.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY    >0)
